## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` pass
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

Note: generated icon components and `dist/` are not committed. If your change affects
